sn7.7:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. Then the brahmin Suddhika Bharadvaja approached the Blessed One and exchanged greetings with him. When they had concluded their greetings and cordial talk, he sat down to one side
and recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn7.7:2.1:
2
"In the world no brahmin is ever purified
Though he be virtuous and austere in practice;
One accomplished in knowledge and conduct is purified,
Not the others, the common folk."
